blocker: CORS policy and net::ERR_FAILED on API calls

mismatches.description: Live frontend API calls to https://api.poe.lama-lan.ch are blocked by CORS policy. The frontend is unable to fetch data for services, session, and messages.
mismatches.evidence: Console errors: Access to fetch at 'https://api.poe.lama-lan.ch/api/v1/ops/services' from origin 'https://poe.lama-lan.ch' has been blocked by CORS policy
